message:
⚡ Lazy-load remaining drilldown view components (#10226)

Convert LogsDrillDown, GPUNodeDrillDown, and YAMLDrillDown from eager
imports to safeLazy() for deferred chunk loading (~751 lines deferred).

Fixes #10217
